items.title: We built an app as a side hustle and sold it for $4 million without quitting our tech jobs. Here's how AI helped us juggle it all.
items.title_original: We built an app as a side hustle and sold it for $4 million without quitting our tech jobs. Here's how AI helped us juggle it all.
items.title_en: We built an app as a side hustle and sold it for $4 million without quitting our tech jobs. Here's how AI helped us juggle it all.
items.title_zh: 我们开发了一款应用程序作为副业，并以 400 万美元的价格出售，但并未放弃我们的技术工作。以下是人工智能如何帮助我们应对这一切的。

items.title_en: Samsung's bonus deal is fueling employee resentment over a 100x payout gap between memory division staff and those making smartphones, TVs, and home appliances (Yoolim Lee/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 三星的奖金协议加剧了员工的不满，因为内存部门员工与智能手机、电视和家用电器制造部门员工之间的薪酬差距达 100 倍（Yoolim Lee/彭博社）

items.title: Filing: Zoom's stake in Anthropic is worth ~$1.27B based on a February round which valued Anthropic at $380B; Zoom invested an additional $46M in recent months (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)

items.title_zh: 备案：Zoom 在 Anthropic 的股份价值约 $1.27B，基于 2 月份的一轮融资，Anthropic 的估值为 $380B； Zoom 近几个月额外投资了 4600 万美元（Brody Ford/彭博社）

items.title: AI chatbots got election information wrong 90% of the time in a new study — including ChatGPT rivals
items.title_original: AI chatbots got election information wrong 90% of the time in a new study — including ChatGPT rivals
